introOneDescription: SurveyPocket app is a Survey app to conduct field survey on your iPad, iPhone or Android tablet and smart phone devices.
introTwoDescription: SurveyPocket App is simple and makes field surveys and interviews possible anytime anywhere without internet.
introThreeDescription: With SurveyPocket App Kiosk mode, you can easily display various form of media and collect survey responses at your kiosk location.
